series_metadata.series_title: Refund of Expenditure Within the Biennium for Prior Year
series_metadata.series_description: Used to record receipts or repayment where the original payment was in error, duplicated, or made illegally. This is done within the biennium for the prior year.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: audited by Auditor of State & audit report is released & all discrepancies are resolved ; Electronic: audited by Auditor of State & audit report is released & all discrepancies are resolved
